name: lark-api
description: 最小可安装的飞书 API 类 Skill 示例包，强调 docs v2 版本约束、权限 token 边界、异常处理与交付契约。

scripts.check:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path='SKILL.md'; const s=fs.readFileSync(path,'utf8'); if(!s.startsWith('---
')) throw new Error('SKILL.md 缺少 YAML front matter 起始 ---'); const end=s.indexOf('
---
',4); if(end<0) throw new Error('SKILL.md 缺少 YAML front matter 结束 ---'); const y=s.slice(4,end).trim(); for (const k of ['name:', 'description:', 'version:', 'trigger:']) if(!y.includes(k)) throw new Error('front matter 缺少 '+k); console.log('OK: front matter boundary and required keys found');"
